title: build(deps): bump github.com/containers/image/v5 from 5.20.0 to 5.21.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/image/v5](https://github.com/containers/image) from 5.20.0 to 5.21.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/image/v5's releases.

v5.21.0

What's Changed

  • Release v5.20.0 by @​mtrmac in containers/image#1482
  • storage: use race-free AddNames instead of SetNames by @​flouthoc in containers/image#1480
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.14.4 to 1.15.0 by @​dependabot in containers/image#1484
  • Update github.com/containerd/containerd by @​mtrmac in containers/image#1485
  • build(deps): bump github.com/docker/distribution from 2.8.0+incompatible to 2.8.1+incompatible by @​dependabot in containers/image#1486
  • build(deps): bump github.com/sylabs/sif/v2 from 2.3.2 to 2.4.0 by @​dependabot in containers/image#1488
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.0 to 1.15.1 by @​dependabot in containers/image#1490
  • build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker from 20.10.12+incompatible to 20.10.13+incompatible by @​dependabot in containers/image#1489
  • Silence go-staticcheck about openpgp use by @​mtrmac in containers/image#1491
  • Try to make (make lint) pass with Go 1.18 by @​mtrmac in containers/image#1492
  • build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.7.0 to 1.7.1 by @​dependabot in containers/image#1494
  • Use assert.ErrorContains by @​mtrmac in containers/image#1495
  • build(deps): bump github.com/sylabs/sif/v2 from 2.4.0 to 2.4.1 by @​dependabot in containers/image#1496
  • Formally require Go 1.15 by @​mtrmac in containers/image#1493
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containers/ocicrypt from 1.1.2 to 1.1.3 by @​dependabot in containers/image#1498
  • build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker from 20.10.13+incompatible to 20.10.14+incompatible by @​dependabot in containers/image#1504
  • registries.conf: prefixes: subdomain matching by @​vrothberg in containers/image#1505
  • toml decoding: report unknown keys by @​vrothberg in containers/image#1507
  • registries.conf: fix typo in prefix by @​vrothberg in containers/image#1508
  • build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux from 1.10.0 to 1.10.1 by @​dependabot in containers/image#1511
  • Add option to specify the identity for signing by @​Jamstah in containers/image#1510
  • Add pull-from-mirror for adding per-mirror level restrictions by @​QiWang19 in containers/image#1411
  • build(deps): bump github.com/sylabs/sif/v2 from 2.4.1 to 2.4.2 by @​dependabot in containers/image#1513

Full Changelog: https://github.com/containers/image/compare/v5.20.0...v5.21.0

Commits
  • d03e80f Release v5.21.0
  • dc7fe92 Merge pull request #1513 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/syl...
  • 44eb409 build(deps): bump github.com/sylabs/sif/v2 from 2.4.1 to 2.4.2
  • f3198c2 Merge pull request #1411 from QiWang19/digest-set-for-mirror
  • 0642df2 Add pull-from-mirror for adding per-mirror level restrictions
  • fcf8dda Merge pull request #1510 from Jamstah/sign-identity
  • 030d990 Use only full named references for signing identity
  • 7dde4a3 Add option to specify the identity for signing
  • b073049 Merge pull request #1511 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/ope...
  • 75748af build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
